headline: Netflix Stock is at New Lows, But Its FCF Is Strong - Is NFLX Too Cheap?
summary: Netflix stock keeps dropping. It's now below the low price before dropping its Warner Bros. bid in late February. However, its FCF is strong and expected to remain high. Value investors are circling -it's too cheap.

content.title: Netflix Stock is at New Lows, But Its FCF Is Strong - Is NFLX Too Cheap?
content.summary: Netflix stock keeps dropping. It's now below the low price before dropping its Warner Bros. bid in late February. However, its FCF is strong and expected to remain high. Value investors are circling -it's too cheap.
